scope: generated PgSql\\Connection PgSql\\Result and PgSql\\Lob class metadata
PGSQL_ASSOC PGSQL_NUM PGSQL_BOTH and PGSQL_CONNECTION_OK constants

procedural pg_connect pg_pconnect pg_close pg_query pg_query_params pg_prepare pg_execute fetch row/assoc/array/object/result row and field counts affected rows last error result error and escape helpers
opt-in live PostgreSQL smoke when PHRUST_POSTGRES_TEST_DSN is set
non_scope: persistent connection pooling because pg_pconnect opens a normal connection
large objects copy helpers notifications async polling and tracing
default connection edge-case parity beyond last successful connection
next_step: Promote upstream pgsql PHPTs once resource/object identity, large objects, copy helpers, notifications, and connection status APIs are implemented.
